metadata.title: Careers | TalepNET
metadata.description: Explore open roles at TalepNET across growth and product as we build a modern B2B procurement platform.

listPage.heroTitle: Build the next stage of TalepNET with us.
listPage.introTitle: Join a small team building practical software for real procurement problems.
paragraphs: TalepNET is building a B2B SaaS product for companies that have outgrown fragmented purchasing processes. We care about workflows, clarity, and execution quality more than startup theatre.
We are still early, which means the team is small, decisions are direct, and each role has visible impact. The work is hands-on and cross-functional, with room to shape how the company grows.

If you are looking for a polished enterprise machine with layers of process, this is probably not the right fit. If you want to help build a disciplined product and company from an early stage, it probably is.
We are looking for people who can work with ownership, communicate clearly, and improve how TalepNET goes to market and how the product evolves.
listPage.finalCtaTitle: We are building AI-powered procurement software with better visibility, stronger control, and less friction across the workflow.
listPage.emptyRolesMessage: There are no open positions at the moment. You can send your resume to our talent pool for future opportunities in our team.
